description_long: This object depicts a police officer dressed in a dark tactical uniform, complete with body armor and protective gear. The figure is outfitted with a utility belt and a holstered firearm, and a compact submachine gun is positioned nearby, suggesting readiness for urban operations. The uniform features reinforced padding on the arms and legs, as well as gloves and heavy-duty boots, indicating a focus on protection and mobility. The officer's head is covered by a helmet with a visor, providing facial protection and communication capabilities. The overall appearance is that of a modern, urban tactical police unit, with a streamlined, utilitarian design. The color palette is predominantly black and dark gray, with subtle highlights on the armor and accessories.
description: A tactical police officer in dark body armor and helmet, equipped with a utility belt and a submachine gun, designed for urban operations.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full spread of the officer's arms, helmet, and the submachine gun positioned above the right shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, body armor, and the submachine gun lying parallel to the officer's torso.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view displaying the back of the helmet, the rear of the body armor, and the submachine gun above the left shoulder.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the officer's gear, helmet, and the submachine gun parallel to the torso.
attribute_uniform_type: Tactical police uniform with long-sleeve armored shirt, reinforced pants, black gloves, heavy-duty boots, and a black ballistic vest.
attribute_headgear_style: Black tactical helmet with integrated visor, full coverage, and minimal external markings.
